title: Anthropic Claude
html:
Anthropic Claude

Anthropic's AI assistant — both a target platform for Rankett tracking and the primary build partner Yahir uses to actually ship Rankett as a solo founder. The dual role is structural: Claude is one of the AI assistants whose response surface Rankett's AI Visibility Engine measures share-of-voice in (per 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide, alongside ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Grok, DeepSeek, and Google AI Overviews) — and the assistant Yahir queries to deep-think alongside him about strategy, code, and product framing.

The build-partner role traces back to a thesis Yahir was already articulating in November 2021. 2021 11 05 ceos of the future poses the question: "Do you think CEOs of the future will be at a disadvantage if they are not engineers or don't have an understanding of technology?" The 2026 answer he found is that CEOs without engineering backgrounds aren't disadvantaged if they have an LLM that closes the gap. Claude (alongside WindSurf IDE and the broader Claude Code surface) is the instrument that lets Yahir be the engineer. The note's foreshadowing logic — be the technical CEO so the gap doesn't matter — gets answered by use Claude so the gap closes itself.

The 2026 01 13 rankett com note documents the workflow in real time: Yahir prompts Claude to deep-think about whether ai search optimization is the right space, who else is "truly pursuing this with all of their intention and soul", and what the moat looks like. The note reads less like a to-do list and more like a working session with an assistant — "ok we have been working on a general AI visibility space for a few month now and have done a whole lot." The first-person plural is doing real work there. This is itself a workflow worth tagging.

The Claude-as-target-platform role appears in the 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide product spec: Rankett's audit-fix-rescore loop has to query Claude's response surface to measure how often a brand surfaces in answers, with what sentiment, and with what share-of-voice against competitors. The bet is that prompts are the new keywords — including prompts that route to Claude. The category breadth (across all 7 major AI assistants) is what makes the whitelabel play viable: agencies can sell visibility against the AI surface their clients actually use, regardless of which model that is.

Source summaries

  • 2021 11 05 ceos of the future
  • 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide

Connections
